query:
INSERT INTO organizations (name, slug, contactName, contactEmail, startDate, goalDate, status) VALUES

('JCRHC', 'jcrhc', 'Site Contact', 'contact@jcrhc.org', 'February 1, 2026', 'April 1, 2026', 'active'),

('Intellirad', 'intellirad', 'Site Contact', 'contact@intellirad.com', 'February 1, 2026', 'April 1, 2026', 'active')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name=VALUES(name);
